name: preview object exists
requirement: The return-cell object exists only as a preview candidate before admission.

name: preview boundary passed
requirement: The preview boundary receipt passed with no channel admission.

name: transport contract exists
requirement: DAT-style finite information transport contract exists.

name: contract refuses transport
requirement: The contract currently admits no information transport.

name: contract refuses channels
requirement: The contract currently admits no channels.

name: successor rule exists
requirement: The P -> Q by R successor-rule scout passed.

name: rule minima unique
requirement: Every P row has a unique R-selected target.

name: packet 002 agreement
requirement: Q matches the previously named packet 002.

name: target endpoint balance
requirement: Q target endpoints balance across limits 23 and 24.

name: same-anchor plus repair signature
requirement: Q has three same-anchor rows and one carrier-incidence repair.

name: body unchanged
requirement: G900 body remains 900 vertices and 3600 edges.

name: no body mutation claim
requirement: The successor scout claims no body mutation, no added vertices, and no added edges.

name: no transport admission
requirement: This gate audit does not admit information transport.

name: no physics claim
requirement: This gate audit makes no force, physics, or unification claim.
